title: Failing Test Root Cause Loop
prompt: Read `./failing-test-regression.md`, `./failing-test-history.md`, and `./failing-test-stop-conditions.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Produce the debugging approach before any code change. Keep the response rooted in evidence gathering, incident-boundary awareness, and structural escalation when needed.

assertions.name: root-cause-before-fix
assertions.description: The response insists on characterizing the failure before proposing a fix.

assertions.name: history-used-as-context
assertions.description: Past defect history informs hypotheses without replacing current evidence.

assertions.name: structural-escalation-present
assertions.description: The output states when to escalate beyond local debugging.

assertions.name: stays-debugging-shaped
assertions.description: The response remains a debugging loop, not a patch plan.
